(l) This order may be called the Banning ofLindane Order,20l L (2) lt shall come into force on the date ofpublication ofthis Order in the Official Gazette. 2. No person shall manufachfe, import or formulate Lindane from thc date of publication of this order in the OffrcialGazene. 3. No penon shall use Lindane afler the period of two years fiom the date olpublication of rhis Order in the Official Gazette. 4. The certificates ofrcgistration for Lindane granted underthe Section 9ofthe saidActshall be deemed to have been cancelled. 5. Every Srate Govemment shall take all such steps under the provisions ofthe said Act and the rules framed thereunder, as it considers necessary for thc execution of this order in the State. [F.
